title: How to request a refund for a purchased game
content:
UAP offers refunds within 14 days of purchase provided total playtime is under 2 hours.

STEPS TO REQUEST A REFUND:
1. Go to Support > Contact Us.
2. Select "Refund" as the issue category.
3. Fill in your name, email, and describe the game and reason for refund.
4. Submit the form. Our team will review within 1-3 business days.
5. If approved, funds are returned to your original payment method within 3-7 business days.

NOTES:
- DLC, in-game items, and UAP Wallet top-ups are not eligible for refund.
- Games with more than 2 hours of playtime are not eligible.
- Refund requests older than 14 days from purchase date will be declined.

If you have questions about your refund status, contact our support team directly.

title: Fixing "Game failed to launch" error
content:
The "Game failed to launch" error usually occurs due to missing files, driver issues, or software conflicts.

SOLUTIONS (try in order):
1. RESTART THE CLIENT — Close UAP completely and reopen it.
2. VERIFY GAME FILES — Go to your Library, right-click the game, select "Verify Integrity of Game Files."
3. UPDATE GPU DRIVERS — Visit your GPU manufacturer's website (NVIDIA, AMD, or Intel) and install the latest drivers.
4. RUN AS ADMINISTRATOR — Right-click the game executable and select "Run as administrator."
5. DISABLE ANTIVIRUS TEMPORARILY — Some antivirus software blocks game executables. Add UAP and the game folder to your antivirus exclusions list.
6. REINSTALL DIRECTX & VISUAL C++ — Download and reinstall the latest DirectX and Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributables from the Microsoft website.
7. REINSTALL THE GAME — Uninstall the game from your Library, then reinstall it.

If none of the above steps resolve the issue, please contact our support team with your system specifications and the exact error message.

title: How to enable Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
content:
Two-Factor Authentication adds an extra layer of security to your UAP account by requiring a verification code in addition to your password.

HOW TO ENABLE 2FA:
1. Log in to your UAP account.
2. Go to Profile > Settings > Security.
3. Under "Two-Factor Authentication," click "Enable."
4. Choose your preferred method: Authenticator App (recommended) or SMS.
5. Follow the on-screen setup instructions.
6. Save your backup codes in a secure location.

USING AN AUTHENTICATOR APP:
- Download Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator on your phone.
- Scan the QR code shown on the UAP settings page.
- Enter the 6-digit code from the app to confirm setup.

IMPORTANT:
- Store your backup codes somewhere safe. If you lose access to your authenticator app, backup codes are the only way to recover your account.
- If you change phones, transfer your authenticator before wiping the old device.

Enabling 2FA is strongly recommended for all accounts.

title: Slow game downloads — solutions and tips
content:
Slow download speeds can be caused by your internet connection, server load, or background applications.

QUICK FIXES:
1. PAUSE AND RESUME — Sometimes pausing and resuming the download resets the connection to a faster server.
2. CHECK YOUR INTERNET — Run a speed test at fast.com. If speeds are low, try restarting your router.
3. USE ETHERNET — A wired connection is significantly faster and more stable than Wi-Fi.
4. CLOSE BACKGROUND APPS — Close streaming services, browser tabs, and other downloads that consume bandwidth.
5. SCHEDULE DOWNLOADS — Download during off-peak hours (late night or early morning) when servers are less busy.
6. CHECK FOR UPDATES — Make sure UAP itself is up to date. Outdated clients can have slower download pipelines.

ADVANCED:
- In UAP Settings > Downloads, you can set a download bandwidth limit. Make sure it is not set too low.
- Temporarily disable your VPN if you are using one — VPNs can significantly reduce download speeds.

If download speeds remain consistently below 1 MB/s, contact your internet service provider or our support team.

title: Forgot password — how to reset your UAP account
content:
If you have forgotten your password, you can reset it from the login page.

STEPS TO RESET YOUR PASSWORD:
1. Go to the UAP login page.
2. Click "Forgot Password?" below the login form.
3. Enter the email address associated with your account.
4. Check your inbox for a password reset email (also check your spam folder).
5. Click the reset link in the email — it is valid for 24 hours.
6. Enter and confirm your new password.
7. Log in with your new password.

DID NOT RECEIVE THE EMAIL?
- Wait up to 5 minutes and refresh your inbox.
- Check your spam or junk folder.
- Make sure you entered the correct email address.
- If the email still does not arrive, contact our support team.

NOTE: If you no longer have access to the email address on your account, contact support with proof of account ownership (such as purchase history or original registration details).

title: Payment methods available on UAP
content:
UAP supports a wide range of payment methods to make purchasing games as convenient as possible.

ACCEPTED PAYMENT METHODS:
- Bank Transfer (all major Indonesian banks)
- QRIS (scan-to-pay from any banking or e-wallet app)
- GoPay
- OVO
- Dana
- ShopeePay
- Visa Credit / Debit Card
- Mastercard Credit / Debit Card

PAYMENT ISSUES:
- If your payment was deducted but the game did not appear in your library, wait up to 15 minutes and refresh your library.
- If the issue persists after 15 minutes, contact support with your transaction receipt.
- For failed payments, verify that your card or e-wallet has sufficient balance and that the billing details are correct.

All transactions on UAP are secured with SSL encryption.

title: How to change your email address
content:
You can change the email address linked to your UAP account from your profile settings.

STEPS TO CHANGE EMAIL:
1. Log in to your account.
2. Go to Profile > Settings > Edit Profile.
3. In the Email field, enter your new email address.
4. Click "Save Changes."
5. A verification email will be sent to your new address.
6. Click the link in the verification email to confirm the change.

IMPORTANT:
- You must have access to the new email address before making the change.
- After changing your email, use the new address to log in.
- If you did not request an email change, contact our support team immediately as your account may be compromised.

If you cannot access your current email, contact support with proof of account ownership.

title: What to do if your account is hacked
content:
If you suspect your account has been accessed without your permission, act quickly to secure it.

IMMEDIATE STEPS:
1. CHANGE YOUR PASSWORD — If you can still log in, go to Profile > Settings and change your password immediately.
2. ENABLE 2FA — Turn on Two-Factor Authentication to prevent further unauthorized access.
3. CHECK ACTIVE SESSIONS — Review any unfamiliar login activity in your account settings.
4. CONTACT SUPPORT — Submit a ticket via Support > Contact Us, selecting "Account Security" as the category.

WHEN CONTACTING SUPPORT, PROVIDE:
- Your registered email address
- Approximate date you noticed suspicious activity
- Any purchase history you can recall (helps verify ownership)
- The email address you want the account recovered to

Our team will investigate and respond within 24 hours. Do not share your password or personal details with anyone claiming to be UAP staff outside of our official support channels.

title: How to verify and repair game files
content:
If a game crashes, fails to launch, or behaves unexpectedly, corrupted or missing files may be the cause.

HOW TO VERIFY GAME FILES:
1. Open UAP and go to your Library.
2. Find the game with issues.
3. Click the settings icon next to the game.
4. Select "Verify Integrity of Game Files."
5. UAP will scan all game files and automatically re-download any that are missing or corrupted.
6. Once verification is complete, try launching the game again.

NOTES:
- Verification may take several minutes depending on the size of the game.
- Do not close the UAP client during verification.
- If the game continues to have issues after verification, try a full uninstall and reinstall.
- Antivirus software can sometimes quarantine game files and cause verification to fail repeatedly. Add the UAP games folder to your antivirus exclusions list.

title: Understanding your purchase history
content:
Your purchase history is a record of all games and transactions made on your UAP account.

HOW TO VIEW PURCHASE HISTORY:
1. Log in to your account.
2. Go to Profile > Settings.
3. Your recent purchases are listed under the "Purchase History" section.

EACH ENTRY SHOWS:
- Game title
- Date and time of purchase
- Amount paid
- Payment method used
- Transaction status

IF A PURCHASE IS MISSING:
- Check that you are logged into the correct account.
- Wait up to 15 minutes after payment for the transaction to appear.
- If it still does not appear and payment was deducted, contact support with your payment receipt.

Your purchase history is also useful when contacting support about refunds or missing items, so keep your transaction receipts when possible.
